prompt: Create a polished square advertising image for Colgate Sensation White, split vertically into two equal halves with a glowing divider line in the center, showing a side-by-side contrast between tradition and modern science. On the left half, place an elderly African woman seated behind a pale marble tabletop in a warm, earthy interior with carved wooden wall panels and a clay pot in the background. She wears a richly patterned traditional rust-orange and gold wrap dress with layered bead necklaces and bracelets, and has short gray natural hair. She holds a natural chewing stick near her mouth in a calm, dignified pose. Curve the French headline text above her head in large warm golden-yellow letters: "Depuis toujours." On the right half, place a young African child seated behind the same tabletop in a sleek modern blue interior with soft glowing lights and vertical gold accents. The child wears a vivid traditional-modern outfit: a copper-brown tunic with bright blue patterned front panel and gold trim, with neat braided hair, and holds a Colgate toothbrush near the mouth. Curve the French headline text above the child in large bright blue letters: "Pour toujours." At the bottom center, spanning both halves and placed prominently on the marble table, show exactly 2 Colgate Sensation White toothpaste boxes stacked slightly offset, with one matching toothbrush resting on top. The packaging must be highly legible and realistic, featuring the red Colgate logo and blue-white Sensation White branding. Add a bold white French tagline centered along the bottom edge: "Le meilleur de la tradition, la force de la science". Use cinematic commercial lighting, premium product-photography realism, rich skin tones, balanced symmetry, and a visual story of heritage meeting innovation.
